# Database Skill

## Connection

```typescript
// packages/backend/src/lib/database.ts
import pg from 'pg';
import { env } from '../config/env.js';
import { logger } from './logger.js';

const { Pool } = pg;
export const pool = new Pool({ connectionString: env.DATABASE_URL });

pool.on('error', (err) => {
  logger.error({ err }, 'Unexpected database pool error');
});
```

Always import `pool` from `../lib/database.js`. Never create a new `Pool` instance elsewhere.

---

## SQL Rules

### Parameterized queries — mandatory

```typescript
// ✅ correct
const { rows } = await pool.query(
  'SELECT case_id, org_id, status FROM support_cases WHERE org_id = $1 AND status = $2',
  [orgId, 'open'],
);

// ❌ never — SQL injection risk
await pool.query(`SELECT * FROM support_cases WHERE org_id = '${orgId}'`);
await pool.query('SELECT * FROM support_cases WHERE org_id = ' + orgId);
```

### Column lists — always explicit

```typescript
// ✅
SELECT case_id, org_id, subject, description, severity, status, created_at

// ❌
SELECT *
```

### Error wrapping

```typescript
import { DatabaseError } from '../errors/index.js';

try {
  const { rows } = await pool.query(sql, params);
  return rows;
} catch (err) {
  throw new DatabaseError('Failed to fetch support cases', err);
}
```

---

## Schema Overview

```sql
-- Primary tables
orgs (
  org_id        UUID PRIMARY KEY,
  name          TEXT NOT NULL,
  plan          TEXT,              -- 'free' | 'team' | 'enterprise'
  sso_enabled   BOOLEAN,
  created_at    TIMESTAMPTZ
)

support_cases (
  case_id       UUID PRIMARY KEY,
  org_id        UUID REFERENCES orgs(org_id),
  subject       TEXT NOT NULL,
  description   TEXT NOT NULL,
  severity      TEXT,              -- 'low' | 'medium' | 'high' | 'critical'
  status        TEXT DEFAULT 'open',
  created_at    TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
)

subscriptions (
  subscription_id UUID PRIMARY KEY,
  org_id          UUID REFERENCES orgs(org_id),
  tier            TEXT,
  seat_count      INTEGER,
  renewal_date    DATE
)

document_chunks (
  chunk_id        UUID PRIMARY KEY,
  source_url      TEXT NOT NULL,
  section_heading TEXT,
  chunk_text      TEXT NOT NULL,
  embedding       VECTOR(1536)     -- pgvector, text-embedding-3-small
)
```

---

## pgvector

Always use `::vector` cast when passing embedding arrays:

```sql
-- ✅ correct cast
WHERE embedding <=> $1::vector

-- ❌ no cast — will fail at runtime
WHERE embedding <=> $1
```

For cosine similarity score:

```sql
1 - (embedding <=> $1::vector) AS score
```

---

## Migrations

```bash
# Apply schema
npm run db:migrate -w packages/backend
# → runs: psql -f packages/backend/src/db/schema.sql

# Seed test data
npm run db:seed -w packages/backend
# → runs: tsx packages/backend/src/db/seed.ts
```

Schema file: [packages/backend/src/db/schema.sql](../../packages/backend/src/db/schema.sql)  
Seed file: [packages/backend/src/db/seed.ts](../../packages/backend/src/db/seed.ts)

---

## Primary Keys

All PKs are UUIDs generated by the application layer:

```typescript
import { randomUUID } from 'node:crypto';

const caseId = randomUUID();
await pool.query(
  'INSERT INTO support_cases (case_id, org_id, ...) VALUES ($1, $2, ...)',
  [caseId, orgId, ...],
);
```

Never use `SERIAL`, `BIGSERIAL`, or `AUTO_INCREMENT`. Never use `DEFAULT gen_random_uuid()` — generate IDs in application code.

---

## Transactions

```typescript
const client = await pool.connect();
try {
  await client.query('BEGIN');
  await client.query('INSERT INTO support_cases ...', [...]);
  await client.query('INSERT INTO case_events ...', [...]);
  await client.query('COMMIT');
} catch (err) {
  await client.query('ROLLBACK');
  throw new DatabaseError('Transaction failed', err);
} finally {
  client.release();
}
```

---

## Redis

```typescript
// packages/backend/src/lib/redis.ts
import { Redis } from 'ioredis';
import { env } from '../config/env.js';

export const redis = new Redis(env.REDIS_URL);
```

Used for: SSE event queues, rate-limit counters, session caching.
Always import `redis` from `../lib/redis.js`.
